hero.name: Owais Ali
hero.tagline: AI developer and full stack engineer — building intelligent systems and modern web applications. Currently pursuing MSc in AI, open to interesting challenges.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: AI developer by study, full stack engineer by trade
about.p1: I'm currently pursuing my MSc in Artificial Intelligence at BTU Cottbus, Germany, with an Erasmus exchange at the University of Trieste, Italy. My journey spans full stack engineering, AI/ML, and mobile development.
about.p2: I thrive at the intersection of AI and production engineering — from building LLM-powered document pipelines and RAG systems to architecting React applications serving millions.
about.p3: I share what I learn through YouTube tutorials, Medium articles, and open source. I also mentor aspiring developers and teach as a Session Lead at Udacity.
about.p4: Currently exploring new collaborations in AI, full stack development, and technical guidance.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: AI systems, full stack platforms, and mobile tools I've built

experience.title: Experience
experience.subtitle: 6+ years building products across fintech, real estate, agritech, and more

creative.project: Foxtons — UK-based public real estate platform
creative.p1: Developed next-generation frontend using React, Next.js, TypeScript
creative.p2: Collaborated with designers, backend engineers, and QA to deliver features
creative.p3: Optimized performance via code splitting, lazy loading, and best practices

din.p1: Developed internal tools and customer-facing frontend modules
din.p2: Built automated E2E and component tests with 80%+ coverage
din.p3: Reduced regression issues across international fintech products

ricult.p1: Built full-stack features using Python, Flask, and Ionic
ricult.p2: Developed web and mobile applications supporting farmers globally
ricult.p3: Worked with international teams in Agile environment

bankalfalah.project: Internal Banking Automation & Digital Account Opening
bankalfalah.p1: Developed workflow automation using React Native and IBM BPM
bankalfalah.p2: Digitized internal banking operations for enterprise use
bankalfalah.p3: Automated QA with Appium-based test automation

lakson.p1: Developed backend modules and CRUD applications with PHP Yii2 + MySQL
lakson.p2: Built REST APIs for third-party integrations
lakson.p3: Supported customer onboarding and subscription management

udacity.project: Python & Flask Full Stack Nano Degree
udacity.p1: Guided students through the full stack web development curriculum
udacity.p2: Assisted with Python, Flask, and web development concepts

skills.title: Skills & Technologies

services.title: What I Do
services.subtitle: Building, teaching, and solving — here's how I can help
services.fs_desc: React, Next.js, TypeScript, Python — from concept to production. I build modern, scalable web applications.
services.ai_desc: RAG pipelines, document extraction, agent systems, prompt engineering — integrating AI into real products.
services.guide_desc: Architecture reviews, code quality, best practices. I help teams level up their engineering and AI capabilities.
services.mentor_desc: From Udacity TA to YouTube tutorials — I break down complex topics into clear, actionable knowledge.
services.cta: Currently exploring new collaborations — let's talk

content.title: Teaching & Content
content.subtitle: I share what I build — on YouTube, Medium, and as a Udacity TA
content.yt_desc: Live coding series on YouTube building a full-stack Todo app with Next.js, Drizzle ORM, and deployment.
content.medium_desc: Writing about automation, AI, and web development — including a popular Instagram bot tutorial.
content.udacity_desc: Teaching Assistant for the Full Stack Nano Degree — guiding students through Python and Flask web development.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Have a project, idea, or just want to say hi? I'm always open to interesting conversations.
contact.thanks: Thank you! I'll get back to you soon.
